source_quote: At the 12 month follow-up, however, 45% of the intervention group were marijuana abstinent as measured by TLFB, compared to 22% of the assessed controls (OR 2.89, 95%CI 1.22, 6.84, p<0.014).
Mean Drinks Per Week: MI baseline 14.51 (17.13), 6-Month 8.78 (11.63); FO baseline 19.96 (25.33), 6-Month 9.34 (10.34). There were no statistically significant condition x time interactions.
participants in the MIF group reported consuming 5.26 drinks per week less than participants in the AO group (t(275)=-2.63, p=0.01, effect size of 0.41), when adjusting for baseline levels.
